shared_properties: Primary painted tone uses #535353 with transparent background only.
Outer silhouette keeps 2 px outline weight.
differences: This task supplies the compact cloud silhouette for low-density parallax motion.
The cloud scrolls left at half of the ground speed to suggest depth.
Spawn heights stay within the 10-40 px sky band.

reference_images.label: offline_sprite_1x
reference_images.purpose: 1x pixel atlas for dinosaur, cactus, pterodactyl, digits, and ground proportions.

reference_images.label: gameplay_capture
reference_images.purpose: Gameplay frame for HUD anchoring, sky-ground composition, and runner lane spacing.

bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load one 46x14 PNG during Loading state and spawn cloud instances from a low-density parallax timer.
runtime_notes: Drive horizontal motion at 50 percent of the CurrentSpeed resource.
Spawn cloud instances with y positions between 10 and 40.
Cull a cloud after x drops below -100 and respawn from the right edge later.

context.usage: Appears intermittently in the sky band to add depth without blocking obstacle reads.

shape_notes: Main puff group spans 34 px of the 46 px width.
Bottom edge varies by no more than 2 px across the silhouette.
No interior holes or semi-transparent pixels appear inside the cloud body.

acceptance_criteria: Canvas is exactly 46x14 px with transparent background beyond the silhouette.
Cloud body reads as one compact shape at 1x scale.
Painted pixels use #535353 only and contain no semi-transparent edges.
